steps.title: Fastest check: compare a table or graph
steps.content: For an equivalent-expression question, enter the original expression and the answer choices in a calculator table or graph. The correct choice must match for several inputs, not just one. The matching choice is A, $5{x}^{2}+35$.

steps.title: Algebra check
steps.content: Use the work below to confirm the identity for every allowed input. This matters because one random matching input is only a quick screen, not a proof that two expressions are always equivalent.

steps.title: Evaluate all choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — $5{x}^{2}+35$: matches the distributed result. That confirms A is correct.
  • Choice B — $5{x}^{2}+12$: adds 5 to 7 instead of multiplying. Eliminated.
  • Choice C — $5{x}^{2}+7$: does not distribute 5 to the 7. Eliminated.
  • Choice D — $5{x}^{2}-2$: incorrect arithmetic. Eliminated.
